Scheme Drill-down Detail â�- Top Losses & Gains by Scheme & Transaction Type

Period Scheme Transaction Type Net Cost Events Effective vs System (days) Pre-approp Gap (days) SLA Met % Reason (latest)
Effective vs System Date shows days between effective date and system date. Pre-approp Gap shows days between CB Approps informed date and preappropriation added date. Top losses and gains are highlighted when filtering by transaction type. Rachel and Amy will use this to identify large losses and drill into specific transaction type drivers at scheme level.

Loss/Gain Summary by Transaction Type

Transaction Type Total Losses Total Gains Net Movement Events

Day of Month Losses Gains Net Movement Events

Group Business Table (Calculated)

Individual Business Table (Calculated)

Individual detail rows carry category-level Cost values. Preapprop Impact and Net Cost are provided at monthly totals, in line with supplied source format.
